items.title: skill(nature-ref-verifier): harden from 35-ref field audit, promote t…
items.description:
skill(nature-ref-verifier): harden from 35-ref field audit, promote to Stable

- Step 2.0: DOI resolvability check via CrossRef as cheapest first pass
- Critical: missing authors, article-number letter traps, DOI misassignment
- Warning: Early Access metadata drift (CrossRef current value wins)
- Zotero sync section rewritten (local API read-only, pyzotero Web preferred)
- Batch guidance (10-15 refs per parallel subagent)
- README/README_EN: nature-ref-verifier Beta -> Stable
items.label: commit
